message:
✨ Compact overlay at top + search focus fix

- Overlay: single-row compact bar at top (was 180px bottom panel)
- Configurable position via OverlayPosition.top/bottom enum
- Slides down from top by default, auto-hides after 5s
- Search: cursor now focuses in text field when clicking search icon
- Focus returns to main key handler when search is closed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
